name: Care Transition Discharge Information Receipt Codes
description: CPT codes for receipt and documentation of discharge information including transitional care management services, observation care discharge, and hospital discharge day management. Used in care transition quality measures to verify that discharge information was received and processed by the receiving care setting.
source: Public CMS/clinical references — placeholder for official NCQA value sets

codes.description: Transitional care management services with moderate medical decision complexity; communication within 2 business days of discharge, face-to-face visit within 14 days
Transitional care management services with high medical decision complexity; communication within 2 business days of discharge, face-to-face visit within 7 days
Hospital discharge day management; 30 minutes or less
Hospital discharge day management; more than 30 minutes
